positive: A stylized, geometric forest of abstract bioluminescent mushrooms and ethereal foliage. The scene features interlocking curved lines and sharp, modern patterns, creating a sense of natural wonder and mystery. The main subject is a grouping of exaggerated, luminous fungi and deep jungle flora. Use a color palette dominated by neon teal, royal purple, electric lavender, and deep sapphire blues, contrasting against solid black negative space. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical, central, and scalable for apparel printing. High contrast, clean silhouette edges, line art quality mixed with digital paint texture, retro-futuristic aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, noise, watermark, text, signature, logo, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealistic, gradient fade, low contrast, grunge, distracting elements
